ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the school belongs to */,
  "head_coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_ids" TEXT /* Array of references to assistant coaches */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment of the school */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the school's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* School's mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_head_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_assistant_coach_ids FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_coach_ids") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Range of years for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with this metric */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the metrics were recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played within the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points scored on average per game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team name */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the game was home or away */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Detailed location of the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Array of referees' names */,
  "tv_channel" TEXT /* TV channel broadcasting the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Tournament) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school they coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Coach's hometown */,
  "alma_mater" TEXT /* Coach's alma mater */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Overall coaching record (e.g., 100-50) */,
  "highest_achievement" TEXT /* Highest achievement in coaching (e.g., National Championship) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Coach's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Coach's phone number */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Coach's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the stats */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins during the season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total losses during the season */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the team in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the team in the season */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the team in the season */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the team in the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the team in the season */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the team in the season */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted by the team in the season */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made by the team in the season */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted by the team in the season */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the team in the season */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted by the team in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the current head coach
